SEARCH
Package com.societegenerale.failover.core.observable.publisher

Class AbstractObservablePublisher

java.lang.Object
com.societegenerale.failover.core.observable.publisher.AbstractObservablePublisher
All Implemented Interfaces:
ObservablePublisher
Direct Known Subclasses:
MdcLoggerObservablePublisher
public abstract class AbstractObservablePublisher extends Object implements ObservablePublisher
Base ObservablePublisher that delegates publishing to doPublish(com.societegenerale.failover.core.observable.Metrics).

The publish timestamp is stamped once by CompositeObservablePublisher before fan-out, so individual publishers receive an already-timestamped Metrics object.

Author:
Anand Manissery
